title: Discharge Headlight Hood COMP removal and inspection

blocks.text: Discharge Headlight Hood COMP removal and inspection
Since the hood COMP is an integral part of the headlight assembly, it cannot be detached by itself. Therefore, when removing and installing the hood COMP, remove the headlight assembly.
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

Confirm that the hood COMP operates when the 12V battery (+) is connected to the No. 2 terminal of the coupler (A) and (-) to the No. 1 terminal. In this condition, confirm that the hood COMP returns to its original position when the 12V battery (-) is disconnected. If the hood COMP is not working properly, replace the headlight.

refs.label: If the hood COMP is not working properly, replace the headlight.
